nodes.name: GatewayService
nodes.description: Receives API requests and forwards them to PaymentOrchestrator.

nodes.name: PaymentOrchestrator
nodes.description: Calls RiskEngine before processing payments through StripeAdapter.

nodes.name: MerchantService
nodes.description: Creates merchant profiles and links them to KYCWorkflow.

nodes.name: KYCWorkflow
nodes.description: Uses DocumentVerifier and sends final status to MerchantService.

nodes.name: DocumentVerifier
nodes.description: Verifies documents as part of the KYC process.

nodes.name: OnCallRunbook
nodes.description: References GatewayService health checks and rollback actions.

relations.description: GatewayService receives API requests and forwards them to PaymentOrchestrator.
PaymentOrchestrator calls RiskEngine before processing payments.
PaymentOrchestrator charges through StripeAdapter after evaluating risk.
MerchantService creates merchant profiles and links them to KYCWorkflow.
KYCWorkflow uses DocumentVerifier for document verification.
KYCWorkflow sends the final status of the KYC process to MerchantService.
References GatewayService health checks and rollback actions.
